title: clidemia oxyura
intro: Clidemia oxyura is a plant species commonly known as the 'Firecracker Plant' due to its vibrant red and yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clidemia oxyura include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Clidemia oxyura can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
